mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_collection_log WHERE data_type = #{dataType} AND job_type = #{jobType} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM data_collection_log WHERE data_type = #{dataType} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM data_collection_log WHERE data_type = #{dataType} AND job_type = #{jobType} AND trade_date = #{tradeDate} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM data_collection_log ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
